response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with distributed systems, but his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the Technical Lead — Cloud Compute Platform role, particularly in C++ and large-scale cloud infrastructure leadership.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and infrastructure, including high-performance microservices and Kubernetes-based platforms.
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks, indicating strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills.
Diverse technical background with a focus on testable, scalable projects and open-source contributions.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (last noted in 2015), which is a minimum qualification for the role.
Primary expertise lies in full-stack and web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than cloud compute platforms or hardware-adjacent infrastructure.
No explicit experience in technical leadership roles specifically focused on cloud or DevOps engineering teams.
